mapper.select: SELECT id, title, author, price, publish_date, description FROM book
SELECT id, title, author, price, publish_date, description FROM book WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (title, author, price, publish_date, description) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{price}, #{publishDate}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET title = #{title}, author = #{author}, price = #{price}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
